channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: William Ruto's Lang'ata Visit Interrupted by Thrown Object During Housing Tour
item.description: During President William Ruto's visit to Lang'ata on April 28, tensions rose while inspecting the ongoing Soweto Affordable Housing Project. The initiative aims to construct 4,600 units, providing job...

item.title: Chhattisgarh Board Announces Class 10th and 12th Results for 2026
item.description: The Chhattisgarh Board of Secondary Education (CGBSE) has scheduled the release of Class 10 and Class 12 examination results for 29th April 2026 at 2.30 pm. Students who appeared for these board exams...

item.title: National Treasury Seeks Accountability for R151 Billion in Municipal Mismanagement
item.description: South Africa’s municipal finances are under intense scrutiny following revelations of R151 billion in unauthorised, irregular, fruitless, and wasteful expenditure across 257 municipalities. Auditor-Ge...

item.title: 17 Essential Exercises Recommended by Personal Trainers for Health and Strength
item.description: This article compiles advice from 17 personal trainers on the exercises they consider most beneficial for overall health, functional strength, and wellbeing. Key exercises include the deadlift, which ...

item.title: Considerations for Choosing a Home Battery Before Government Subsidy Changes
item.description: Australians are rapidly installing home batteries, with over 260,000 systems added since July 2025 under the Cheaper Home Batteries Program. This scheme offers roughly a 30% discount on eligible batte...

item.title: Ikuru Monarch Rejects Disbandment of OSPAC Security Outfit by Local Government
item.description: The Okan Ama of Ikuru Town, King Aaron Miller Ikuru, don sharply condemn the decision of the Andoni Local Government Chairman, Hon Prince Lucky Otuo, to disband the local security outfit, OSPAC. Accor...

item.title: Karnataka Passes Rohith Vemula Bill to Ensure Equality and Dignity in Education
item.description: The Karnataka Rohith Vemula (Prevention of Discrimination, Exclusion or Injustice) (Right to Education and Dignity) Bill, 2026, has been approved by the state cabinet after extensive discussions and c...

item.title: Justice Kayani orders PM to explain delay in PTA tribunal appointment
item.description: On the final day of his tenure at the Islamabad High Court (IHC), Justice Mohsin Akhtar Kayani issued a strong warning regarding the non-appointment of the finance member of the Telecommunications App...

item.title: PwC Encourages South African Investment in Nigerian Oil to Strengthen Energy Security
item.description: PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC) has called on South African investors, banks, and policymakers to consider direct investments in Nigeria's upstream oil sector to secure crude supplies for their domestic ...

item.title: Eduarda Braum expresses gratitude for her memorable visit to the Philippines
item.description: Eduarda Braum, who was recently crowned Miss Supranational 2025, expressed her heartfelt gratitude for the warm welcome and unforgettable experiences she had during her stay in the Philippines. The be...

item.title: Regina Faces Uncertainty Over Safe Consumption Sites Amid Rising Overdoses
item.description: Over the past weekend, Regina experienced a troubling surge in overdoses, with 29 emergency calls and three suspected overdose deaths linked to an especially potent drug supply. The Saskatchewan Healt...

item.title: Islamabad Bar Voices Concerns Over Recent IHC Judges Transfers
item.description: In Islamabad, the recent transfer of three judges from the Islamabad High Court (IHC) has sparked significant concern among the legal community. The Islamabad Bar Council (IBC) criticised the move, de...

item.title: Rappler Recognized for Engaging Citizens in Flood Control Reporting at APAC Digital Media Awards
item.description: Rappler’s FloodControlPH initiative, which empowers citizens to report suspicious flood control projects, won the gold award for 'Best in Audience Engagement' at the Digital Media Awards Asia-Pacific ...

item.title: Senate Blocks War‑Powers Resolution Aimed at Preventing U.S. Military Action Against Cuba
item.description: The U.S. Senate voted 51‑48, largely along party lines, to shelve a Democratic‑led war‑powers resolution that would have blocked President Donald Trump from launching military action against Cuba with...

item.title: Police Investigate Circumstances Behind University Student Connie Githinji's Death in Nairobi
item.description: On April 26, 2026, Consolata Githinji, widely known as Connie, a 22-year-old Murang’a University College student and social media influencer, tragically died after falling from the sixth floor of a sh...

item.title: How Couples Can Navigate Finances Before Marriage
item.description: Planning a wedding is exciting, but for many couples, the topic of money can be tricky to discuss. A 2024 study found that more than one in four couples see money as their biggest relationship challen...

item.title: Ukraine Reports Record Drone Interceptions and Expands Offensive Range
item.description: Ukraine’s defence forces reportedly shot down a record 33,000 Russian drones in March, marking the highest monthly figure since Russia’s full-scale invasion began over four years ago. The nation has a...

item.title: 40 Insurgent Fighters Killed During Clash Between ISWAP and Boko Haram in Sambisa Forest
item.description: Reports don come in say about 40 fighters don die after serious clash between ISWAP and Boko Haram inside Sambisa Forest for Borno State. Security sources talk say the fight happen on April 27 around ...

item.title: Carlton and Port Adelaide react to AFL draft rule changes affecting father-son and academy selections
item.description: Carlton Football Club has strongly criticised the AFL for implementing immediate changes to the father-son and academy draft rules, arguing that the overhaul will unfairly disadvantage certain clubs. ...

item.title: West Bengal 2026 Phase 2 Voting Updates: Key Contest Between Mamata Banerjee and Suvendu Adhikari
item.description: The second phase of voting in the 2026 West Bengal elections has commenced, with key constituencies including Bhabanipur in South Bengal witnessing intense political activity. Chief Minister Mamata Ba...
